caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio against a background of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a plain white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of him, with the text "Rode" visible on the equipment. In the initial scene, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which is blurred due to movement. As the sequence progresses, his hand drops out of view, and he continues speaking with a slight smile, shifting his gaze toward someone or something off-camera to his right. He maintains a focused yet conversational expression throughout the clip, his mouth moving as he communicates while remaining stationary in front of the recording equipment.
